general.name: mos_target_obsmode_parquet
general.description: The table contains observing constraints for different observing modes. Cadences have an observing mode associated with each epoch, and the constraints are checked before an epoch can be scheduled.
general.naming_convention: $MOS_TARGET/[V_TARG]/[FTYPE]/mos_obsmode.[FTYPE] with FTYPE='parquet' and V_TARG='2.0.0' for DR20.

changelog.description: Describes changes to the datamodel product and/or file structure from one release to another

label.name: label
label.description: Descriptive name for the observing mode, e.g. 'dark_rm'

min_moon_sep.name: min_moon_sep
min_moon_sep.description: Minimum distance a target must be from the Moon

min_deltav_ks91.name: min_deltav_ks91
min_deltav_ks91.description: Minimum estimated background flux from the Moon, using the method of Krisciunas, K., & Schaefer 1991

min_twilight_ang.name: min_twilight_ang
min_twilight_ang.description: Minimum twilight angle (angle of the Sun below the horizon) for a target to be observed

max_airmass_apo.name: max_airmass_apo
max_airmass_apo.description: Max airmass at which a target can be observed at APO

max_airmass_lco.name: max_airmass_lco
max_airmass_lco.description: Max airmass at which a target can be observed at LCO
